name: Walker's Liquorice Toffees 150g (Gluten Free)
description:
Walker's Liquorice Toffees 150g (Gluten Free)

Discover the bold and nostalgic taste of Walker’s Liquorice Toffees in a convenient 150g bag — the perfect grab-and-go treat for liquorice lovers! At Sweetsworld, we’ve been connecting customers across Australia and worldwide with the finest imported sweets and Australian favourites since 2013. Our passion for premium confectionery makes Walker’s a natural fit for our collection of top-quality goodies.

Walker’s Nonsuch has been crafting traditional toffee for generations, and their liquorice version is a true standout. Each individually wrapped piece offers a satisfying chew, combining creamy toffee goodness with a rich liquorice flavour that hits all the right notes. It’s a delightful balance of smooth sweetness and that unmistakable liquorice kick.

This 150g pack is ideal for snacking, gift baskets, lunchbox treats, or keeping a sweet stash handy wherever you go. Whether you’re already a fan of classic liquorice or looking to explore a new taste experience, Walker’s Liquorice Toffees deliver a timeless indulgence in every bite.

Treat yourself to the classic flavours you love — shop Walker’s Liquorice Toffees 150g today at Sweetsworld, your trusted source for the world’s best sweets, delivered with care!
